title: Farmer's Delight x Create: Unbrekable Netherite Knife
description: This mods simply adds a new knife variant to farmer's delight that is unbreakble, and to craft it you need mechanical crafters
body:
![Icon of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08dc9eb9690ec23190e49d927b2bd1a0f93a5f02_0.webp)
# Farmer's Delight x Create: Unbreakable Netherite Knife
Killing mobs with a knife that is about to break is not the best feeling. That's where unbreakable netherite knife comes in, this mod simply fixes it by making it unbreakable so you don't have to mind of your weapon breaking and the pigs escaping.

![The actual recipe for it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2dbb81682c9d7f0fe55c9ee15ff5e7da67a0eae.png)

**Curseforge Version:** [Link (Click me)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight-x-create-unbrekable-netherite)
